summary: Completed comprehensive end-to-end testing of VIIBE scene intelligence platform. All backend APIs and frontend features working correctly.
passed_tests: All 9 backend API endpoints (waitlist signup, stats, venues live, single venue, city pulse, duplicate prevention)
Landing page loads with all sections (Hero, Problem, Product, API, Waitlist, Footer)
Navbar with VIIBE logo and all navigation links working
Live terminal widget with updating venue scores every 2.5 seconds
Hero section with headline text and CTA buttons functional
Problem section with 3 cards (Google Maps, Social Media, WhatsApp Groups)
Product section Bento grid with Scout Floor, Merchant Floor, Agent API + 4 stats
API section with curl request and live JSON response from real backend
Waitlist role selector (Scout/Venue Owner/Developer) and email signup working
Waitlist duplicate prevention returning 409 status correctly
API Docs page at /docs with all 3 endpoints documented
Try it live buttons showing real API responses
Mobile responsive navbar with hamburger menu
